meta.title: Request Availability - Farm El Baya
meta.description: Send your dates for a direct farm stay request at Farm El Baya in Testour. Private rooms, breakfast included, direct rates from 180 DT/night.

hero.heading: Request your farm stay.
hero.subhead: Send your dates, get availability within 24 hours, and confirm directly with Mahdi before any deposit.

form.success: Your request has been sent. Mahdi will be in touch via WhatsApp or email within 24 hours. We look forward to welcoming you.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at contact@farmelbaya.com
form.payment: Payment is settled on arrival. Tunisian guests may pay by cash or bank transfer. International guests may pay by card when confirmed.
form.deposit: A 30% deposit may be required during peak season to confirm your reservation.
